targets.rawSql: SELECT window_start AS time, site_id AS metric, avg(health_score) AS value FROM network_health.gold_site_health_hourly FINAL WHERE window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time, metric

SELECT window_start AS time, site_id AS metric, avg(pct_interfaces_saturated) * 100 AS value FROM network_health.gold_site_health_hourly FINAL WHERE window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 48 HOUR GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time, metric

SELECT window_start AS time, site_id AS metric, avg(pct_interfaces_down) * 100 AS value FROM network_health.gold_site_health_hourly FINAL WHERE window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 48 HOUR GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time, metric

SELECT window_start AS time, site_id AS metric, sum(critical_syslog_count) AS value FROM network_health.gold_site_health_hourly FINAL WHERE window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 48 HOUR GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time, metric

SELECT site_id, window_start, health_score, pct_interfaces_saturated, pct_interfaces_down, critical_syslog_count FROM network_health.gold_site_health_hourly FINAL WHERE window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 48 HOUR AND is_degraded = 1 ORDER BY window_start DESC, site_id

SELECT avg(health_score) AS avg_health_score FROM (SELECT site_id, argMax(health_score, window_start) AS health_score FROM network_health.gold_site_health_hourly FINAL WHERE window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 48 HOUR GROUP BY site_id)
